---
name: Incident Report
about: Report a production incident
labels: incident
---

## Severity

- [ ] P0 (data loss, full outage, security breach)
- [ ] P1 (feature broken for all users)
- [ ] P2 (degraded experience, workaround exists)

## Timeline

- **Detected**: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM UTC
- **Resolved**: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM UTC
- **Duration**: X minutes

## Impact

<!-- Who was affected? How many users/tenants? What couldn't they do? -->

## Root Cause

<!-- What broke and why? Link to commit/PR if applicable. -->

## Resolution

<!-- What was done to fix it? -->

## Action Items

- [ ] Regression test added
- [ ] Monitoring/alerting improved
- [ ] Root cause permanently fixed (not just patched)
